Name: bUseLowVariationCache
Description: Reduces variation of cached meshes (possibly improving performance) in modules with two skins (male, female) only.

Name: bHasAccessoriesForFemale
Description: Changed beard caption for female skin (1) from ui_change_beard to ui_change_accessories.

Name: bMoreSkinsSupportForMultiplayerProfile
Description: Enable support for more than two multiplayer skins for profile.

Name: bLimitHairColors
Description: Set to true if you don’t have extra hair textures. Each human skin definition in Native uses hair_blonde along with vertex coloring. If you set the value to false the game expects to find for example a material and texture named hair_red, beard_black, etc.
